headline: General Motors Pairs Corvette ZR1 Launch With CarBravo Used Car Push
summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) has introduced the 2026 Chevrolet Corvette ZR1, its latest high-performance sports car. The company is also consolidating its pre-owned vehicle operations under the CarBravo platform. Both moves reflect product and business changes that could influence GM's position in performance vehicles and used car sales. For you as an investor, this pairing of a halo product launch with a reshaped pre-owned channel puts two different parts of GM's business in focus at the same...
